experience_summary: Backend engineer with 7 years building distributed services and internal platforms in Python and Go. Proven track record owning features end-to-end from schema design through deployment, with strong focus on observable, well-tested systems.

highlights: Designed multi-tenant notification microservice handling 4M+ events/day with p99 latency under 80ms
Migrated three legacy Flask monolith modules to microservices, reducing deploy time from 22min to 6min
Introduced OpenTelemetry tracing, cutting MTTR on P1 incidents by ~40%
Built core billing and subscription engine in Go processing €2M/month at launch
Designed Postgres-backed job queue reducing missed-job incidents from ~15/month to zero
Achieved 85% test coverage on critical payment flows using pytest and Pact
Developed REST APIs in Django REST Framework for three client products
Optimized MySQL queries halving response time on most-used report endpoint
Set up CI with GitHub Actions for automated linting and unit tests

suggested_skill_gaps: Kubernetes: Not mentioned in CV. Essential for container orchestration in most senior backend roles. Gap severity: Medium - reduce infrastructure_match by 10-15 when primary requirement
Message Queues (Production): Only Kafka consumer mentioned. Full message queue expertise (RabbitMQ, Apache Kafka producers, SQS) commonly required for distributed systems roles. Gap severity: Medium
NoSQL Databases: Only relational databases mentioned. MongoDB, DynamoDB, or Cassandra experience often required for high-scale backend positions. Gap severity: Low-Medium
Event-Driven Architecture: Mentioned in thesis but no production evidence. Critical for many senior backend roles. Gap severity: Medium
System Design: No explicit large-scale system design experience mentioned. Expected for senior+ backend roles. Gap severity: Medium
Service Mesh: No mention of Istio, Envoy, or similar. Increasingly common in microservices environments. Gap severity: Low
Infrastructure as Code: Only basic Terraform mentioned. Advanced IaC skills (CloudFormation, Pulumi, advanced Terraform) often required. Gap severity: Low-Medium

suggested_narratives.stay: Mid-level backend engineer with 7 years building distributed services in Python and Go. Seeking senior backend roles to deepen technical leadership in high-scale systems. Using zero-downtime migration framework at Velox as proof of systems thinking and multi-team impact. Targeting senior backend positions at scale-ups or mid-stage companies with complex distributed architectures.
suggested_narratives.pivot: Backend engineer with 7 years distributed systems experience pivoting toward platform engineering. Using internal developer portal and CI/CD pipeline work at current role as bridge to infrastructure-focused positions. Acknowledging gap in advanced Kubernetes and infrastructure-as-code but demonstrating eagerness to expand via current Terraform work.
suggested_narratives.step_up: Mid-level backend engineer ready for staff-level technical leadership. 7 years building distributed systems with proven mentorship of junior engineers and cross-team architectural impact via zero-downtime migration framework. Targeting staff engineer roles requiring technical strategy and system design ownership.
suggested_narratives.broaden: Backend specialist expanding toward full-stack distributed systems ownership. 7 years deep in Python/Go backend services, now targeting roles combining backend expertise with infrastructure and platform concerns. Using current AWS ECS and observability work as proof of broader systems interest.
